body.updateMessage: Thanks for the input. Give me minute.

body.messageBody: Capacity @{body('List_resources_by_resource_group')?['value'][0]?['name']} exists, adding you as capacity admin and extending it by @{variables('DeleteAfter')} hours!
Capacity @{body('Create_a_resource')?['name']} created until @{formatDateTime(body('Create_a_resource')?['tags']?['DeleteDate'], 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC')}. You are now an admin

Capacity @{variables('CapacityName')} deleted. Delete Date was@{formatDateTime(body('Read_a_resource_-_delayed')?['tags']?['DeleteDate'], 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC')}, current time @{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC')}.

Capacity @{variables('CapacityName')} deletion omitted. It was extended until @{formatDateTime(body('Read_a_resource_-_delayed')?['tags']?['DeleteDate'], 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC')}, current time @{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss UTC')}.
Capacity @{variables('CapacityName')} deletion failed. Please remove capacity manually, or contact your administrator.
